channel.title: System Design on Abdul HaQ
channel.description: Recent content in System Design on Abdul HaQ

item.title: The Evolution of AI ChatBots
item.description: We’re witnessing a shift from stateless prompt-response systems toward context-aware collaborative intelligence.

item.title: Why Scaling Matters — Even When You're Building for 10 Users
item.description: Scaling is not about building for millions from day one. It’s about aligning architecture with business growth.
